summary: ANDROID 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens show device code name "Falcon" instead of proper product name in Device Settings
description_clean: Onboarding screens display the device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name. This occurs when viewing Device Settings > Onboarding after pairing a Falcon device.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Pair a Falcon device (press and hold the Bluetooth button on the device to enter pairing mode).
After successful pairing, tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on Onboarding (or the onboarding option) within Device Settings.
expected: The onboarding screen should display the proper product name (e.g., "Poly Voyager Focus 2" or the correct retail name), not the internal code name.
actual: The onboarding screen displays the device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name.
